calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-01-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jerome Sapiro Jr. for and with Joyce Wickett. Anita Moore (niece of Ms. Wickett) also present.

The court stated that there are two issues; the Arkansas property and the request for extraordinary fees. Mr. Sapiro stated his understanding is that an ancillary administration in Arkansas is not required, that the administration of that property could be done in the primary probate, that if Ms. Wickett provides an affidavit, an order from this court and a deed the title company in Arkansas will issue title insurance, that the order would decree Ms. Wickett's entitlement to her interest in the decedents property and that the Omnibus Clause is sufficient to transfer the property. Mr. Sapiro reported that he negotiated a settlement on the creditor's claim filed by Ms. Hart through her daughter Sonja Pope, that Ms. Hart filed an action against the estate but then passed away, that Ms. Pope did not resurrect the claim as executor of that estate and confirmed that he has withdrawn $6700.00 in fees. Mr. Sapiro also stated that there is currently a Small Estate procedure in Arkansas that may do away with the need for an ancillary probate and provided a new proposed order to that effect. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-17-2015 Continued To Mar-10-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-03-2015 Continued To Feb-17-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Verified Petition For Approval Of Creditor'S Claim.
Off Calendar Oct-11-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jerome Sapiro for Joyce Wickett (Petitioner). Robbie Hart, Gayle Hart and Sonya Pope (Family Members) also present.

The Family members spoke of their claim with regard to personal property. The Court granted the Petition for Approval of Creditors's Claim (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Tauscher.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-08-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jerome Sapiro, Jr. for and with Joyce Wickett (Petitioner).

The Court stated that it reviewed the petition and the declarations in support of the petition, and that everything appeared to be in order. The Court granted the petition (signing the order for the same in open court). The will was admitted and no bond is required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-17-2010 Continued To Dec-08-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
